items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: The exploratory step cannot be validated due to insufficient evidence.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The requirement to validate the persona scenario of 'Graceful degradation when agent confused' is not supported by the provided evidence. There is no concrete evidence demonstrating the expected behavior or outcome of the scenario, nor is there any indication that the scenario has been executed or tested. The linked use cases and prior step evidence do not provide relevant information to confirm the scenario's behavior, leading to an inconclusive assessment.
